case_title: EMILY I. COOPER et al VS. MITZI M. BROWN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, NO APPEARANCES.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $671.83 FILED BY COOPER, EMILY I. COOPER, JENNIFER W. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M. HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-27-2010 AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2010 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-23-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PRESENT BENCH LETTER WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID $ 366.00 BY PERSONAL CHECK. IF NO APPERANCES OEX WILL BE DISCHARGED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR ADVISED TO COMPLETE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ONCE CHECK HAS CLEARED THE BANK.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, EMILY I. COOPER, JENNIFER W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, MITZI M. $335.92 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $365.92, ALTHOUGH THERE IS NO WRITTEN AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, DEFENDANT DID RECEIVE THE BENEFIT OF PLAINTIFF'S RENTAL OF THE VEHICLE. THE COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT SHALL SHARE THE COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2010 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-16-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
